ð£ INSTAGRAM JUST DROPPED THIS ð£ You can now send automated DMs to new followers instantly!

It was just announced at the Instagram Summit by @manychat (an official Meta business partner)

most people are going to use this to just blast links to their products and wonder why nobodyâs buyingâ¦ But Iâll be doing something much smarter w/ this for myself & our clients ð¤

Hereâs the strategy:

1ï¸â£Â Instead of telling people about your products in the first message after they follow you, send a GENUINE thank-you message first.

2ï¸â£Â Ask which of 3 topics this new follower is most interested in learning about.

(these can be the top 3 things that people DM you about or that your content focuses on!)

3ï¸â£Â When someone picks one, they get an automatic DM that sends them a link to a Reel about that specific topic.

4ï¸â£Â The reel walks them through a valuable transformation and includes a call-to-action to comment.

5ï¸â£Â Once they comment, they enter one of your other DM automations naturally, feeling helped at every step rather than sold to ð«¶

This creates a perfect flywheel that keeps generating leads and sales without constant maintenance ð¤ð¤

TL;DR in just a few mins, you turn followers â buyers w/ a system that feels HELPFUL > pushy.

âÂ If you want a checklist on how to add this to your Instagram account in under 10 minutes:

Follow me, then comment âFLYâ and Iâll dm it to you!

#ManychatPartner

FYI this feature is currently in beta but you can get access only via Manychat (which my checklist will walk you through.)

share.share_text:
In an 18-hole golf game, the golf club contacts the ball for less than 1/10th of a second total. Each shotâs contact lasts about 0.0004 to 0.0005 seconds, and with roughly 72 shots in a par round, the cumulative contact time is approximately 0.0324 seconds, about 1/30th of a second. This brief interaction, influenced by club type and swing speed, underscores the precision required in golf.

Follow me @golfballing for more!
